svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="DLQ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="110" x="-2030" y="-1160" as="geometry" />
